The '''Massassi Arena''', located on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], was once a great fighting arena. The Arena was multi-leveled stone structure, with boxes on the top level at its east and west. A pyramidal altar was to its north, and a gate to its south.<ref name="BFI guide">[[Star Wars Battlefront: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Battlefront'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref>

[[File:Yavin_Arena_BF_2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The main entrance of the arena.]]
Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the arena was [[Raid on Yavin 4|captured]] from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] by a force of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], who converted it into a monitoring outpost.<ref name="BFI guide" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Arena appears in a map in the [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''. During the Historical Campaign, the battle on the map appears as an Imperial mission, although the game's story is [[Canon|secondary continuity]], according to [[Leland Chee]], the keeper of [[Lucasfilm]]'s [[Holocron continuity database]].<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|holocron|56|starwars.com forum HolocronKeeper comments archive}}</ref> The map is also available in the game's [[Star Wars: Battlefront II|sequel]] via an [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] Live patch. The Arena also appears as a multiplayer match in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''.
